metadata._EXPERIMENTAL_WARNING: This template uses ARM features that are experimental. Experimental features should be enabled for testing purposes only, as there are no guarantees about the quality or stability of these features. Do not enable these settings for any production usage, or your production environment may be subject to breaking.

metadata.description: Azure region for most resources (not Static Web App — see staticWebAppLocation)
Static Web App metadata location — must be one of the allowed regions
Application name prefix — lowercase alphanumeric, 3-10 chars (e.g. "lawgate")
Deployment environment tag
PostgreSQL administrator password
JWT signing secret key — minimum 32 characters, generated from a CSPRNG
Existing PostgreSQL flexible server name — set to empty string to create a new one
PostgreSQL administrator login username for the existing server
Existing VNet name — set to reuse a pre-existing VNet and its subnets instead of creating a new one
Azure External ID external tenant ID — populate after running scripts/setup-external-id.ps1
Azure External ID backend API app client ID — populate after running scripts/setup-external-id.ps1

metadata._EXPERIMENTAL_WARNING: This template uses ARM features that are experimental. Experimental features should be enabled for testing purposes only, as there are no guarantees about the quality or stability of these features. Do not enable these settings for any production usage, or your production environment may be subject to breaking.

metadata.description: Azure region for all resources
Name for the Log Analytics Workspace
Name for the Application Insights instance
Log retention in days (min 30, max 730 for free tier)
App Insights connection string — safe to use in app settings directly
App Insights resource ID
Log Analytics Workspace resource ID

metadata._EXPERIMENTAL_WARNING: This template uses ARM features that are experimental. Experimental features should be enabled for testing purposes only, as there are no guarantees about the quality or stability of these features. Do not enable these settings for any production usage, or your production environment may be subject to breaking.

metadata.description: Azure region for the storage account
Storage account name — must be globally unique, 3-24 lowercase alphanumeric chars
Blob container name for legal documents

metadata._EXPERIMENTAL_WARNING: This template uses ARM features that are experimental. Experimental features should be enabled for testing purposes only, as there are no guarantees about the quality or stability of these features. Do not enable these settings for any production usage, or your production environment may be subject to breaking.

metadata.description: Azure region — only used when creating a new VNet
Name for a new VNet — only used when existingVnetName is empty
Name of an existing VNet to reuse. Set this to skip VNet creation and reference existing subnets and DNS zone.
App Service subnet name inside the existing VNet. Only used when existingVnetName is set.
PostgreSQL Flexible Server subnet name inside the existing VNet. Only used when existingVnetName is set.
Subnet resource ID for App Service regional VNet integration
Subnet resource ID for PostgreSQL Flexible Server VNet injection
Private DNS zone resource ID for privatelink.postgres.database.azure.com
VNet resource ID

metadata._EXPERIMENTAL_WARNING: This template uses ARM features that are experimental. Experimental features should be enabled for testing purposes only, as there are no guarantees about the quality or stability of these features. Do not enable these settings for any production usage, or your production environment may be subject to breaking.

metadata.description: Azure region for the database server
PostgreSQL Flexible Server name — must be globally unique, 3-63 chars
Administrator login username
Administrator password — must meet PostgreSQL complexity requirements
Name of the application database
PostgreSQL version
Compute SKU — Standard_B1ms is sufficient for dev/staging; upgrade for prod load
Backup retention in days
Delegated subnet resource ID — required for VNet injection (private access mode). Leave empty to use public access.
Private DNS zone resource ID — required when delegatedSubnetResourceId is set

metadata._EXPERIMENTAL_WARNING: This template uses ARM features that are experimental. Experimental features should be enabled for testing purposes only, as there are no guarantees about the quality or stability of these features. Do not enable these settings for any production usage, or your production environment may be subject to breaking.

metadata.description: Static Web App name
Static Web App metadata location — limited to specific regions

metadata._EXPERIMENTAL_WARNING: This template uses ARM features that are experimental. Experimental features should be enabled for testing purposes only, as there are no guarantees about the quality or stability of these features. Do not enable these settings for any production usage, or your production environment may be subject to breaking.

metadata.description: Azure region for the App Service
App Service Plan name
Web App name — must be globally unique (becomes <name>.azurewebsites.net)
Application Insights connection string
Key Vault URI — used to build @Microsoft.KeyVault() references in app settings
CORS allowed origin (Static Web App URL)
Frontend base URL used in email links (Static Web App URL, e.g. https://<hostname>)
Azure External ID tenant ID — leave empty until setup-external-id.ps1 is run
Azure External ID API app client ID — leave empty until setup-external-id.ps1 is run
Subnet resource ID for regional VNet integration — routes App Service outbound traffic through the VNet to reach PostgreSQL via private endpoint
Principal ID of the system-assigned managed identity — passed to Key Vault module for RBAC

metadata._EXPERIMENTAL_WARNING: This template uses ARM features that are experimental. Experimental features should be enabled for testing purposes only, as there are no guarantees about the quality or stability of these features. Do not enable these settings for any production usage, or your production environment may be subject to breaking.

metadata.description: Azure region for Key Vault
Key Vault name — must be globally unique, 3-24 alphanumeric and hyphen chars
PostgreSQL connection string to store as a secret
JWT secret key (min 32 characters)
Storage account name — used to retrieve keys for the connection string
Azure Communication Services primary connection string
Sender email domain from the Azure Managed Domain (e.g. <uuid>.azurecomm.net)
Principal ID of the App Service managed identity that needs read access
Backend API URL
Frontend Static Web App URL
Key Vault name (for referencing secrets post-deployment)
PostgreSQL server fully qualified domain name
Storage account name
Azure Communication Services resource name
App Insights connection string (safe — not a secret)
